name: rty-test-plugin
description: Minimal test plugin to validate the subtree-based external plugin strategy

interface.shortDescription: Minimal plugin for validating the hub's external plugin subtree strategy.
interface.longDescription: A deliberately minimal plugin with a single skill. Used to validate that the git subtree approach for vendoring external team plugins into rty-aip-hub works correctly across Claude Desktop, Cursor, Codex, and Copilot.
